name: Brother Dave's Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Chicken stock, or your choice
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat.
2. Work in the spices, onions, and peppers.
3. Simmer for about 30 minutes or until it looks good.
4. Add tomato sauce, tomatoes, and broth.
5. Simmer several hours until it looks good.
6. Stir in the Masa to thicken the mix.
7. When ready, add the Pueblo's Bitters and nutmeg to set it off.
8. Discard any bay leaf stems.
9. Serve with cornbread (or your choice of side dish).
